subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Have mercy upon Thy servants and handmaidens in these Thy days, and send down upon them that which shall cause them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان ارحم عبادک و امائک فی ایامک ثم انزل علیهم ما یجعلهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
